1→import 'package:flutter/widgets.dart';
     2→import 'package:obers_ui/src/components/buttons/oi_button.dart';
     3→
     4→/// A button that displays only an icon.
     5→///
     6→/// This is a thin wrapper around [OiButton.icon] that exposes the same
     7→/// parameters as a regular [StatelessWidget] for convenience.
     8→///
     9→/// ```dart
    10→/// OiIconButton(
    11→///   icon: Icons.add,
    12→///   onTap: () => doSomething(),
    13→/// )
    14→/// ```
    15→///
    16→/// {@category Components}
    17→class OiIconButton extends StatelessWidget {
    18→  /// Creates an [OiIconButton].
    19→  const OiIconButton({
    20→    required this.icon,
    21→    required this.semanticLabel,
    22→    this.onTap,
    23→    this.size = OiButtonSize.medium,
    24→    this.variant = OiButtonVariant.ghost,
    25→    this.enabled = true,
    26→    super.key,
    27→  });
    28→
    29→  /// The icon to display inside the button.
    30→  final IconData icon;
    31→
    32→  /// Called when the button is tapped.
    33→  final VoidCallback? onTap;
    34→
    35→  /// The size tier.
    36→  final OiButtonSize size;
    37→
    38→  /// The visual style variant.
    39→  final OiButtonVariant variant;
    40→
    41→  /// Whether the button responds to interactions.
    42→  final bool enabled;
    43→
    44→  /// Accessibility label announced by screen readers.
    45→  final String semanticLabel;
    46→
    47→  @override
    48→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    49→    return OiButton.icon(
    50→      icon: icon,
    51→      onTap: onTap,
    52→      size: size,
    53→      variant: variant,
    54→      enabled: enabled,
    55→      semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
    56→    );
    57→  }
    58→}
    59→

1→import 'package:flutter/widgets.dart';
     2→import 'package:obers_ui/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme.dart';
     3→import 'package:obers_ui/src/primitives/display/oi_image.dart';
     4→
     5→// ── Selection mode ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     6→
     7→/// Selection behaviour for list / grid widgets.
     8→///
     9→/// {@category Composites}
    10→enum OiSelectionMode {
    11→  /// No selection is allowed.
    12→  none,
    13→
    14→  /// Only a single item can be selected at a time.
    15→  single,
    16→
    17→  /// Multiple items can be selected simultaneously.
    18→  multi,
    19→}
    20→
    21→// ── Gallery item ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    22→
    23→/// An item in the gallery.
    24→///
    25→/// {@category Composites}
    26→class OiGalleryItem {
    27→  /// Creates an [OiGalleryItem].
    28→  const OiGalleryItem({
    29→    required this.key,
    30→    required this.src,
    31→    required this.alt,
    32→    this.thumbnailUrl,
    33→  });
    34→
    35→  /// Unique identifier for this gallery item.
    36→  final Object key;
    37→
    38→  /// The image source URL or asset path.
    39→  final String src;
    40→
    41→  /// Accessibility description for the image.
    42→  final String alt;
    43→
    44→  /// An optional smaller thumbnail URL used in the grid.
    45→  final String? thumbnailUrl;
    46→}
    47→
    48→// ── Gallery widget ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    49→
    50→/// Image / media gallery grid with selection and lightbox preview.
    51→///
    52→/// Displays [items] in a grid with [columns] columns. Items can be tapped
    53→/// individually via [onItemTap]. When [selectionMode] is not
    54→/// [OiSelectionMode.none], tapping toggles selection and [onSelectionChange]
    55→/// reports the updated [selectedKeys].
    56→///
    57→/// {@category Composites}
    58→class OiGallery extends StatelessWidget {
    59→  /// Creates an [OiGallery].
    60→  const OiGallery({
    61→    required this.items,
    62→    required this.label,
    63→    this.columns = 4,
    64→    super.key,
    65→    this.selectionMode = OiSelectionMode.none,
    66→    this.selectedKeys = const {},
    67→    this.onSelectionChange,
    68→    this.onItemTap,
    69→    this.showUpload = false,
    70→    this.onUpload,
    71→    this.gap = 8,
    72→  });
    73→
    74→  /// The list of gallery items.
    75→  final List<OiGalleryItem> items;
    76→
    77→  /// Semantic label for the gallery.
    78→  final String label;
    79→
    80→  /// Number of columns in the grid.
    81→  final int columns;
    82→
    83→  /// The selection behaviour.
    84→  final OiSelectionMode selectionMode;
    85→
    86→  /// The set of currently selected item keys.
    87→  final Set<Object> selectedKeys;
    88→
    89→  /// Called when the selection changes.
    90→  final ValueChanged<Set<Object>>? onSelectionChange;
    91→
    92→  /// Called when an item is tapped (regardless of selection mode).
    93→  final ValueChanged<OiGalleryItem>? onItemTap;
    94→
    95→  /// Whether an upload placeholder tile is shown at the end.
    96→  final bool showUpload;
    97→
    98→  /// Called when the upload tile is tapped. The list parameter can carry
    99→  /// platform-specific file references.
   100→  final ValueChanged<List<Object>>? onUpload;
   101→
   102→  /// The gap in logical pixels between grid cells.
   103→  final double gap;
   104→
   105→  void _handleTap(OiGalleryItem item) {
   106→    onItemTap?.call(item);
   107→
   108→    if (selectionMode == OiSelectionMode.none) return;
   109→
   110→    final newSelection = Set<Object>.from(selectedKeys);
   111→    if (selectionMode == OiSelectionMode.single) {
   112→      if (newSelection.contains(item.key)) {
   113→        newSelection.remove(item.key);
   114→      } else {
   115→        newSelection
   116→          ..clear()
   117→          ..add(item.key);
   118→      }
   119→    } else {
   120→      // multi
   121→      if (newSelection.contains(item.key)) {
   122→        newSelection.remove(item.key);
   123→      } else {
   124→        newSelection.add(item.key);
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→    onSelectionChange?.call(newSelection);
   128→  }

   149→      child: GridView.builder(

   153→        gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
   154→          crossAxisCount: columns,
   155→          mainAxisSpacing: gap,
   156→          crossAxisSpacing: gap,
   157→        ),
   158→        itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   159→          // Upload tile
   160→          if (showUpload && index == items.length) {
   161→            return GestureDetector(
   162→              key: const Key('oi_gallery_upload'),
   163→              onTap: () => onUpload?.call(const []),
   164→              child: Semantics(

   167→                child: Container(

   187→
   188→          final item = items[index];

   190→          final imgSrc = item.thumbnailUrl ?? item.src;

   359→  /// Formats a [DateTime] into a readable string.
   360→  String _formatTimestamp(DateTime dt) {
   361→    final y = dt.year.toString().padLeft(4, '0');
   362→    final m = dt.month.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
   363→    final d = dt.day.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
   364→    final h = dt.hour.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
   365→    final min = dt.minute.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
   366→    return '$y-$m-$d $h:$min';
   367→  }
   368→}

     7→/// A state in a state diagram.
     8→///
     9→/// Represents a single node rendered as a rounded rectangle at a given
    10→/// [position] inside the [OiStateDiagram].
    11→class OiStateNode {
    12→  /// Creates an [OiStateNode].
    13→  const OiStateNode({
    14→    required this.key,
    15→    required this.label,
    16→    this.position = Offset.zero,
    17→    this.color,
    18→    this.initial = false,
    19→    this.terminal = false,
    20→  });
    21→
    22→  /// A unique key used to identify this state when connecting transitions.
    23→  final Object key;
    24→
    25→  /// The display label for this state.
    26→  final String label;
    27→
    28→  /// The position of this state node inside the diagram canvas.
    29→  final Offset position;
    30→
    31→  /// An optional color override for the node background.
    32→  final Color? color;
    33→
    34→  /// Whether this is the initial state (drawn with an incoming arrow).
    35→  final bool initial;
    36→
    37→  /// Whether this is a final/accepting state (drawn with a double border).
    38→  final bool terminal;
    39→}
    40→
    41→/// A transition between states.
    42→///
    43→/// Represents a directed edge from [from] to [to] with an optional [label].
    44→class OiStateTransition {
    45→  /// Creates an [OiStateTransition].
    46→  const OiStateTransition({
    47→    required this.from,
    48→    required this.to,
    49→    this.label,
    50→    this.color,
    51→  });
    52→
    53→  /// The key of the source [OiStateNode].
    54→  final Object from;
    55→
    56→  /// The key of the target [OiStateNode].
    57→  final Object to;
    58→
    59→  /// An optional label displayed alongside the transition arrow.
    60→  final String? label;
    61→
    62→  /// An optional color override for the transition arrow.
    63→  final Color? color;
    64→}
    65→
    66→/// A visual state machine diagram showing states as nodes and transitions
    67→/// as edges.
    68→///
    69→/// States are rendered as rounded rectangles with labels. Transitions are
    70→/// drawn as arrows between states with optional labels. The [currentState]
    71→/// is highlighted with a distinct border.
    72→///
    73→/// {@category Composites}
    74→class OiStateDiagram extends StatelessWidget {
    75→  /// Creates an [OiStateDiagram].
    76→  const OiStateDiagram({
    77→    required this.states,
    78→    required this.transitions,
    79→    required this.label,
    80→    this.currentState,
    81→    this.editable = false,
    82→    this.onStateSelect,
    83→    this.width,
    84→    this.height,
    85→    super.key,
    86→  });
    87→
    88→  /// The list of state nodes to render.
    89→  final List<OiStateNode> states;
    90→
    91→  /// The list of transitions connecting states.
    92→  final List<OiStateTransition> transitions;
    93→
    94→  /// Accessibility label for the diagram.
    95→  final String label;
    96→
    97→  /// The key of the currently active state, highlighted visually.
    98→  final Object? currentState;
    99→
   100→  /// Whether the diagram supports interactive editing.
   101→  final bool editable;
   102→
   103→  /// Called when a state node is tapped.
   104→  final ValueChanged<Object>? onStateSelect;
   105→
   106→  /// The width of the diagram canvas.
   107→  final double? width;
   108→
   109→  /// The height of the diagram canvas.
   110→  final double? height;
   111→
   112→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   113→  // Constants
   114→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115→
   116→  static const double _nodeWidth = 120;
   117→  static const double _nodeHeight = 48;
   118→  static const double _nodeRadius = 8;
   119→  static const double _initialMarkerSize = 8;
   120→
   121→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   122→  // Build
   123→  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   124→
   125→  @override
   126→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   127→    final colors = context.colors;
   128→    final resolvedWidth = width ?? 400;
   129→    final resolvedHeight = height ?? 300;
   130→
   131→    // Map state keys to nodes for quick lookup.
   132→    final nodeMap = <Object, OiStateNode>{};
   133→    for (final state in states) {
   134→      nodeMap[state.key] = state;
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    return Semantics(
   138→      label: label,
   139→      child: SizedBox(
   140→        width: resolvedWidth,
   141→        height: resolvedHeight,
   142→        child: Stack(
   143→          clipBehavior: Clip.none,
   144→          children: [
   145→            // Paint transitions as a background layer.
   146→            Positioned.fill(
   147→              child: CustomPaint(
   148→                painter: _TransitionPainter(
   149→                  transitions: transitions,
   150→                  nodeMap: nodeMap,
   151→                  nodeWidth: _nodeWidth,
   152→                  nodeHeight: _nodeHeight,
   153→                  defaultColor: colors.border,
   154→                  textColor: colors.textMuted,
   155→                ),
   156→              ),
   157→            ),
   158→            // Render state nodes.
   159→            for (final state in states)
   160→              Positioned(
   161→                left: state.position.dx,
   162→                top: state.position.dy,
   163→                child: _buildNode(context, state, colors),
   164→              ),
   165→          ],
   166→        ),
   167→      ),
   168→    );
   169→  }
   170→
   171→  Widget _buildNode(
   172→    BuildContext context,
   173→    OiStateNode state,
   174→    OiColorScheme colors,
   175→  ) {
   176→    final isCurrent = currentState == state.key;
   177→    final nodeColor = state.color ?? colors.surface;
   178→    final borderColor = isCurrent
   179→        ? colors.primary.base
   180→        : colors.border;
   181→    final borderWidth = isCurrent ? 3.0 : 1.5;
   182→
   183→    Widget node = Container(
   184→      key: ValueKey('oi_state_node_${state.key}'),
   185→      width: _nodeWidth,
   186→      height: _nodeHeight,
   187→      decoration: BoxDecoration(
   188→        color: nodeColor,
   189→        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(_nodeRadius),
   190→        border: Border.all(color: borderColor, width: borderWidth),
   191→      ),
   192→      child: Center(
   193→        child: Text(
   194→          state.label,
   195→          textAlign: TextAlign.center,
   196→          style: TextStyle(
   197→            color: colors.text,
   198→            fontSize: 13,
   199→            fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
   200→          ),
   201→        ),
   202→      ),
   203→    );
   204→
   205→    // Final states get a double border via an outer container.
   206→    if (state.terminal) {
   207→      node = Container(
   208→        key: ValueKey('oi_state_final_${state.key}'),
   209→        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(3),
   210→        decoration: BoxDecoration(
   211→          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(_nodeRadius + 3),
   212→          border: Border.all(color: borderColor, width: 1.5),
   213→        ),
   214→        child: node,
   215→      );
   216→    }
   217→
   218→    // Initial states get an incoming marker.
   219→    if (state.initial) {
   220→      node = Row(
   221→        mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
   222→        children: [
   223→          Container(
   224→            key: const ValueKey('oi_state_initial_marker'),
   225→            width: _initialMarkerSize,
   226→            height: _initialMarkerSize,
   227→            decoration: BoxDecoration(
   228→              color: borderColor,
   229→              shape: BoxShape.circle,
   230→            ),
   231→          ),
   232→          Container(
   233→            width: 12,
   234→            height: 2,
   235→            color: borderColor,
   236→          ),
   237→          node,
   238→        ],
   239→      );
   240→    }
   241→
   242→    if (onStateSelect != null) {
   243→      final tappable = GestureDetector(
   244→        onTap: () => onStateSelect!(state.key),
   245→        child: node,
   246→      );
   247→      return tappable;
   248→    }
   249→
   250→    return node;
   251→  }
   252→}
   253→
   254→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   255→// Transition painter
   256→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   257→
   258→/// Paints transition arrows between state nodes.
   259→class _TransitionPainter extends CustomPainter {
   260→  const _TransitionPainter({
   261→    required this.transitions,
   262→    required this.nodeMap,
   263→    required this.nodeWidth,
   264→    required this.nodeHeight,
   265→    required this.defaultColor,
   266→    required this.textColor,
   267→  });
   268→
   269→  /// The list of transitions to paint.
   270→  final List<OiStateTransition> transitions;
   271→
   272→  /// A map from state key to [OiStateNode] for position lookup.
   273→  final Map<Object, OiStateNode> nodeMap;
   274→
   275→  /// The width of each state node.
   276→  final double nodeWidth;
   277→
   278→  /// The height of each state node.
   279→  final double nodeHeight;
   280→
   281→  /// The default arrow color when [OiStateTransition.color] is null.
   282→  final Color defaultColor;
   283→
   284→  /// The color used for transition labels.
   285→  final Color textColor;

   287→  @override
